---
title: "Pair Programming R Workshop Tasks"
subtitle: "DEMO"
format: html
---


```{r}
#| label: example-function
#| eval: false 

add <- function( first_argument, second_argument ) {
  result <- first_argument + second_argument
  return(result)
}
```

```{r}
#| label: example-function-use
#| eval: false 

result1 <- add( 4, 6 )
result2 <- add( 9, 7 )
result3 <- add( result1, result2 )
```

```{r}
#| label: demo-1

```

```{r}
#| label: demo-2

```
